Ya what I’m most confused about is, given where AI and automation is heading, how much population collapse is actually a good thing?

comment.body:
Also, the population collapse argument PZ brings up is kinda like saying one form of fiat currency is worse than the other. All fiats are being devalued. Same with population collapse, all first world developed countries are also facing population collapse. So it’s all relative.

And right now, China is in the best position to handle that issue well, particularly with their full embracement of industrial automation. Just compare their ports to ours.
